Yun Cheng

Email: yuncheng@andrew.cmu.edu

[CV]

My name is Yun (Catherine) Cheng. I’m a rising senior @ Carnegie Mellon University School of Computer Science and Mellon College of Science studying Discrete Maths and Logic. I’ll be joining ML@CMU for the 5th-year MSML program starting in Spring 2022.

Projects

  • Edge (interactive game) (15-112 Term Project, 2018)
  • Emotion Detection with Ensemble-based CNN (10-701 Final Project, 2020)
  • MultiBench: Robustness (Research, 2021)
